entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Learning : 1H 2025
entry.content: I would like to share this with a client that does not have access to SAP Community. How can I share this while making sure to credit the author and SAP properly?

entry.title: Re: Insert multiple keyword into a Category via Impex
entry.content:
The issue you are facing might be due to missing unique modifier. Given that there are two keywords for same category, impex might create new row and update it with new data.

For newer commerce versions following insert_update works by creating two separate entries:

INSERT_UPDATE Category2KeywordRelation;$category[unique=true];$keyword[unique=true];$lang
;goggles;testa:en
;goggles;testb:en

entry.title: Re: Sales order availability check
entry.content: hi @Lakshmipathi  sir stock is there.  i shared the screenshot to show that 1 order is getting confirmed and other is not getting confirmed.

entry.title: Re: Does role template apply to created POD?
entry.content:
Hi @okakoshow ,

you can't control access to PODs that you create through role collections. Authorization to access custom PODs is granted through the Manage POD Users app: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/pod-assigner.

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: AIF Namespace /EDCII
entry.content: Hi MrTs, thank you for your Hint. I've allready did it. I added the Init Function Before Mapping (EDOC_AIF_INIT_REQUEST_MAPPING) . With this FuBa I got other Error like this: (Error when calling &EDOC_AIF_INIT_REQUEST_MAPPING& Character string as message or exception with OTR text). Without this Function Before Mapping in namespace /EDCII I get XML like this: This XML file does not appear to have any style information associated with it. The document tree is shown below. <n0:SendRequest xmlns:n0="http://www.sap.com/gs/slh/dcp/services" xmlns:prx="urn:sap.com:proxy:RQ1:/1SAI/TAS5EE8F64AACA8E1DA3A88:758"> <action/> <system/> <process/> <altPartnerId/> <organizationId/> <receiverId/> <document> <documentId/> <documentType/> </document> </n0:SendRequest>

entry.title: Re: Associate multiple Keywords to a Category Via Impex
entry.content:
The issue you are facing might be due to missing unique modifier. Given that there are two keywords for same category, impex might create new row and update it with new data.

For newer commerce versions following insert_update works by creating two separate entries:

INSERT_UPDATE Category2KeywordRelation;$category[unique=true];$keyword[unique=true];$lang
;goggles;testa:en
;goggles;testb:en

entry.title: How to default a cost center for vendor line item through substitution
entry.content: When i try to default a cost center for one particular vendor through substitution it is not working, can anyone suggest on how to default a cost center for vendor.

entry.title: Logic behind FU/FO in Transportation cockpit
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to figure out the logic behind Freight unit or Freight order Link to action in SAP TM Transportation cockpit. When FU/FO is clicked, it open a Display FU/Display FO screen . We have a requirement where the business wants Edit FU/FO screen to open instead of Display. I tried searching and debugged but not getting anywhere.  Any inputs where to look for the logic behind Link to action for FU or FO ?

TIA

Kind regards,

Arpitha

entry.title: Re: B2BUnit and B2bcustomer and their assignment
entry.content:
To answer your questions:

  1. How B2BUnit and B2BCustomer Assignment Works:
    B2BUnits are organizational entities in B2B commerce representing a business partner company. B2BCustomers are individual users belonging to these units.

    In Backoffice, you can assign B2BCustomers to B2BUnits directly. This assignment is straightforward through the user interface where you can associate a customer to an organizational unit.

  2. Are Many B2BCustomer Assignments Possible?:
    Yes, a B2BUnit can have multiple B2BCustomers assigned to it. Each B2BCustomer can belong to exactly one B2BUnit reflecting the organizational structure of the business partner.

  3. What is the Role of B2BUserGroup? Are They Mandatory?:
    B2BUserGroups are similar to regular user groups but tailored for B2B scenarios. They encapsulate roles and permissions that can be assigned to B2BCustomers to define their functional capabilities and access rights within the e-commerce system.

    They are not mandatory, but they are essential for managing permissions and roles. For security and functionality purposes, users should be grouped appropriately to ensure that they have the correct access levels.

  4. B2BCustomer is Called User in B2B Data Model?:

    In SAP Commerce Cloud, the B2BCustomer extends the User model. It inherits the properties and behaviors of a User but introduces additional attributes specific to B2B scenarios like company affiliation and roles.

  5. User Groups are Also Called Roles in B2B?:
    Yes, user groups align closely with the concept of roles. In B2B commerce, these user groups often map to business-specific roles that users have within an organization, defining their responsibilities and access within the platform.

  6. Why Are There Two Commerce Objects for the Same Person (B2BCustomer and Customer)?:

    The distinction reflects different business models: B2B for business transactions and B2C for individual or consumer transactions. While a profile can potentially belong to both models, they are kept separate to maintain clear operational boundaries and functionalities.

    This separation allows the system to differentiate transactional processes, business rules, and customization specific to B2B and B2C contexts.

  7. More Relationships Between B2BUnit and a Customer:

    SAP Commerce Cloud allows extension of the data model. If additional relationships or attributes are needed between B2BUnit and customers, you can customize the model. OOTB, the primary relationship is direct assignment to one unit.

    You can define custom attributes or create new associations based on your business requirements.

  8. Why Doesn’t Commerce Have a Contact Model in B2B Like in S/4 and C4 Org/Account?:

    SAP Commerce Cloud focuses more on digital commerce capabilities rather than CRM functionalities, which S/4 and SAP C4C handle.

    Commerce Cloud can be integrated with CRM systems where such contact models exist to complement its functionalities with CRM-specific capabilities.

entry.title: Re: Custom entity, $count, $skip, $top not supported
entry.content:
Hi all,

thanks for all your inputs. Finally I was able to solve this issue. As it took me several days to find, I want to share with you.

First of all, I used Postman to do the call by myself. As said, when I remove $top etc., it worked. If I add it again, I noticed that it provides an exception class as part of the error message, which is /IWCOR/CX_OD_URI_SYNTAX_ERROR.

So I've put a break point to the constructor of this exception and I've noticed it gets raised in method  validate_system_query_operation of class /iwcor/cl_od_uri

  METHOD validate_system_query_option.

* OASIS Specification odata-v4.0-wd02-part2-url-conventions-final-2013-06-24.docx, Chapter 5.1
* For GET requests, the following rules apply:
* - Resource paths identifying a single entity, a complex type instance, a collection of entities, or a collection of complex type instances allow $expand and $select.
* - Resource paths identifying a collection allow $filter, $count, $orderby, $skip, and $top. TODO what about skiptoken?
* - Resource paths identifying a collection of entities allow $search.
* - Resource paths not ending in /$count or /$batch allow $format.
*
* For POST requests to an action URL, the return type of the action determines the applicable system query options, following the same rules as GET requests.
* POST requests to entity sets as well as all PUT and DELETE requests do not allow system query options (in OData V4)
* - systemQueryOption = '$id,$search,$filter,$count,$orderby,$skip,$top,$expand,$select,$format'.
* - entityOption      = '$expand,$format,$select'.
* This is not valid for OData V4.01:
* V4.01/protocol/11.4.1.5: returning of results from modification requests:
* modification requests MAY specify $expand and $select for single instance modifications.

    DATA lr_allowlist TYPE REF TO string.

    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_empty             TYPE string VALUE ''.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_service           TYPE string VALUE '$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_service_all       TYPE string VALUE '$search,$count,$skip,$top,$skiptoken,$format,$apply,$select,$filter,$deltatoken'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_service_all_cast  TYPE string VALUE '$search,$count,$skip,$top,$skiptoken,$format,$apply,$select,$filter,$deltatoken'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_metadata          TYPE string VALUE '$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_batch             TYPE string VALUE ''.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_crossjoin         TYPE string VALUE '$search,$count,$skip,$skiptoken,$top,$format,$filter,$apply,$orderby,$expand,$select'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_entity_id         TYPE string VALUE '$id,$expand,$select,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_no_return_type    TYPE string VALUE '$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_entity_set        TYPE string VALUE '$search,$count,$skip,$skiptoken,$top,$format,$filter,$apply,$orderby,$expand,$select,$deltatoken'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_entity_set_ct     TYPE string VALUE '$search,$filter,$deltatoken'. " URL/5.1
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_entity            TYPE string VALUE '$expand,$select,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_media_stream      TYPE string VALUE ''.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_reference         TYPE string VALUE '$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_reference_coll    TYPE string VALUE '$search,$filter,$count,$orderby,$skip,$skiptoken,$top,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_comp         TYPE string VALUE '$expand,$select,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_comp_coll    TYPE string VALUE '$apply,$filter,$count,$orderby,$skip,$skiptoken,$top,$expand,$select,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_comp_coll_ct TYPE string VALUE '$filter'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_prim         TYPE string VALUE '$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_prim_coll    TYPE string VALUE '$filter,$count,$orderby,$skip,$skiptoken,$top,$format'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_prim_coll_ct TYPE string VALUE '$filter'.
    CONSTANTS lc_allowlist_prop_prim_val     TYPE string VALUE '$format'.

    CASE /iwcor/if_od_uri~uri_type.
        " Root Elements
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_service.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_service           INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_service_all.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_service_all       INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_service_all_cast.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_service_all_cast  INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_metadata.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_metadata          INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_batch.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_batch             INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_crossjoin.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_crossjoin         INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_entity_id.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_entity_id         INTO lr_allowlist.
        " 100 - Resources without boundFunctions and without boundAction (Not starting with a FunctionImport)
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_entity_set.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_entity_set        INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_entity_set_cnt.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_entity_set_ct     INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_entity.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_entity            INTO lr_allowlist.
      WHEN /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_media_stream.
        GET REFERENCE OF lc_allowlist_media_stream      INTO lr_allowlist.

In my case, URI_TYPE was set to 100, which corresponds to /iwcor/if_od_uri~gc_type_entity.

You see, it gets handled as Entity and there was a small light bulb in my head turning on. If this is an Entity and not an EntitySet, $top, $count etc. really doesn't make sense at all.

So why was it taken as Entity instead of EntitySet? In UI annotation, I defined it as LINEITEM_REFERENCE, so might this not be an EntitySet?

Answer
NO, this gets defined by cardinality of CDS View. I defined it at 0..1, as in my special case, there can't be more than one record

                                                                    
  composition [0..1] of Z_CE_MFGORDOPERATIONWORKTIME  as _WorkTime

If I change this to [0..*], URI type is set to EntitySet, which allows all $count etc. for sure.

  composition [0..*] of Z_CE_MFGORDOPERATIONWORKTIME  as _WorkTime   //   on  _WorkTime.ManufacturingOrder = $projection.ManufacturingOrder

Conclusion
Always double check cardinallity and there is a really huge difference between 1 and  *

entry.title: sf.group.filter in IPS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to filter a specific permission group in IPS sf.group.filter. I am using API Version 2. It seems that this logic:

displayName eq "xy"

does not work? What is the right Value to filter a specific Permission Group?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Permissions for Data Extraction

In the updated contracts from SAP, there is an option to disable data extraction for AI purposes, however we struggle finding this permission in the SuccessFactors instance. Can someone help us where to do this?

Thanks.

entry.title: Calling NW RFC SDK methods from go environment
entry.content:
Developing a go library to execute RFC using NW RFC SDK

I'm able to,

- open connection 

- close connection

- execute RFCs 

But the method RfcGetParameterDescByName is not returning correct data

It returns correct parameter name in paramDesc property. But rest of the attributes like nucLength, ucLength have value as 0.  _type is either RFC_CHAR or RFC_NULL all the time.

Note: I'm able to read function name from function description handle using RfcGetFunctionName method and number of output parameters using RfcGetParameterCount method

entry.title: Re: How to handle goods lost during transit?
entry.content:
HI @FICOGuy1 

You can do the Good Receipts for full quantity ( Movement type 101) and and Post MIRO logistic invoice to pay full to Vendor.

Next post GO for lost quantity with movement type 551 ( Scraping )

NOTE - You should discuss the solutions with business before posting corrections. Also check if any insurance is there for claim.

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreci...
entry.content:
Hi @Ayman101 

Which migration cockpit object are you using ? 

For creation of assets and uploading asset values, you should use migration object "Fixed asset (incl. balances and transactions)"

 

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: Rework required for Fiori apps exposed in SAP Workzon...
entry.content:
Hello @fvdlangenberg1 ! I see you are relatively new here so welcome to the SAP Community.

Some parts of your question are a little bit confusing but let me focus on the core of your question.

If you have an app in BTP (used in SAP BUILD WorkZone or not) which relies on an external source in a local network which is not exposed to the internet, you need the SAP cloud connector installed in some server on your local network connected with the BTP subaccount you are using. On that same BTP subaccount you'll need a destination which will be used inside your app (both in files xs-app.json to redirect some calls to it and likely in some ui5.yaml files that are needed if you run your app locally/in BAS.

SAP Cloud connector allows you to connect with non-SAP systems, which might be the case of your archive server. So in theory you wouldn't need an API to proxy those calls for you. Assuming you don't need an authentication which is not supported by Cloud Connector, I don't see any issues with having a destination pointing to your archive server via Cloud Connector.

Now it's confusing if you also need this app deployed in your local network or you only use it when developing locally. It's worth sharing here your manifest.json file containing the data sources as well as how are you fetching this files in your controllers. Sharing your ui5.yaml files and your xs-app.json might be helpful as well.

entry.title: How to Use Situation Handling in SAP S/4HANA for Physical Inventory Management
entry.content:
Managing physical inventory efficiently ensures accurate stock levels and smooth warehouse operations. SAP S/4HANA introduces a powerful tool - Situation Handling - that enables proactive issue detection and response during the physical inventory process. With situation types like SPHYSINVMO, users can receive timely alerts about pending or delayed inventory activities, helping them to act swiftly and maintain stock accuracy. In this blog, we learn how to configure situation handling for physical inventory, assign responsible teams, and leverage SAP Fiori apps to stay ahead of operational issues.

Process Guide:

Step 1: Manage Teams and Responsibilities

Provide Name, Description, Global ID, status as Enabled and select search help on type.

Type: SPHYSINVMO - Physical Inventory Monitoring

Category: PHYSINVMO - Physical Inventory Monitoring

Navigate to the responsibility definitions tab and provide relevant data

Navigate to the team members and maintain them as team members

Maintain Functions

Team created

Step 2: Manage Situation Types (App: Manage Situation Type)

Choose the situation template as MAN_PHYSICAL_INVENTORY_MONITOR and proceed to copy

Provide ID, Name under the Admin Information

Under the Conditions tab, set your conditions 

In this case, the PI document must not be counted, must not be deleted, and the difference must not be posted.

Planned count date must be previous 14 Days, the next 3 days, and the plant must be 1000.

Maintain the Time zone and batch start time under the Batch Job Scheduling tab

Navigate to the Situation display tab, and mention the description in the notification

Navigate to the recipients tab, mention the responsibility and the Member function

Navigate to the Situation Monitoring tab, check for Monitor Instances and Capture Data Context and save.

To trigger the instances, click Trigger Now 

Step 3: Monitor Situations (App: Monitor Situations)

Step 4: My Situation in Function Member Account (App: My Situation)

Click on Line Item, and it navigates to Physical Inventory Document

 

Regards,

Leelamohan Mannem

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields in SAP S/4HANA SAP GUI UIs: How to control field properties (mandatory,..
entry.content: @georg_wilhelm GUI transactions doesn't help anyone on S/4HANA Public Cloud, which is where, customers try to find solutions for scenarios like this, the most.

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-in : How to create a dynamic Date range filter
entry.content:
Problem definition:

In the area of reporting, for example in Reports based on date ranges, Its very common to analyze and report data between a start and end date both inclusive ( start and end date included ) and excusive ( without start and end date). While SAC Excel Add-in supports lot of dimension filters based on dimension member relation ship like Self, Dependents, Children etc. currently there is no support for dynamic date range selection or filtering.

Technical Solution:

SAC Excel Add-in supports SAP Formulas to adjust the dimension filters applied to the SAC table. The function SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER overwrites the selected members of a dimension on the selected tables and thus replaces the current filter. The function always returns the new filter displayed with ID.

The SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER function has the following arguments:

  • Tables -  Tables which this formula should affect. Single Table value, comma separated list or Excel range are supported.
  • Dimension -  The dimension on which the filter has to be applied
  • Members - Single value or multiple values from a Excel cell range is supported. Comma separated list or range filters are not directly supported.
  • Selection_types -  numeric values corresponding to one of the relation types can be used.  For e.g. 0 for Self and Descendants (default)
  • Member_display - Controls how the members of the dimension are used in the formula.  For e.g. 0 for ID, 1 for description (default)

Please refer to the link for more details about the SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER and other similar formulas.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/29624d6020b74bf8817bb7df398e5cb6/d3dcf6dbd4824b308be008305745a370.html

We will use the above formula will some excel based tricks to create a dynamic date range filter for our SAC Table filtering.

The newer version of Excel supports dynamic array formula which spill over and create a dynamic range. Once such formula is SEQUENCE(). The SEQUENCE function allows you to generate a list of sequential numbers in an array, such as 1, 2, 3, 4. You can refer to the link for more about SEQUENCE formula and its various usage.

https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/sequence-function-57467a98-57e0-4817-9f14-2eb78519ca90#:~:text=The%20SEQUENCE%20function%20allows%20you,SEQUENCE(4%2C5).

For demonstration I will be using a simple SAC table showing Sales by Ship Date which has members on Day level. The filter is set to show the January month.

To make the Date range analysis dynamic, we will set up 2 cells to capture the Start Date and End Date respectively.

Now we will use the SEQUENCE() function discussed above to generate a dynamic array of all dates that fall between start date and end date provided above. You can adjust the formula to both include and exclude the start and end date.

Formula for inclusive dates ( including first and last day): =TEXT(K3+SEQUENCE(1+K4-K3,,0),"YYYY-MM-dd")

Formula for exclusive dates ( excluding first and last day): =TEXT(K3+SEQUENCE(K4-K3-1,,1),"YYYY-MM-dd")

Cell K3 and K4 have the start date and End date input in the Excel

The TEXT formula is just to format the Date values in SAC date dimension day id format which is YYYY-MM-dd

The result of the above formula would be a dynamic array with all days between he start date and end date. This particular area could be hidden from the main reporting area.

Now as a final setup we will construct our SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER to refer to this dynamic array for Date dimension member filter.

The parameter of this function were discussed above. We can use =SAP.GETTABLENAME(J8)  to get the table name to be passed as parameter to SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER.

=SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER(Q4,"Ship_Date",A9#,0,1)

 Cell Q4 has =SAP.GETTABLENAME(J8).  Cell J8 is the just the header cell of the SAC table. A9#, # is used for formula spilling.

Lets see the results:

 

Summary:

This way we can achieve passing a date range filter to SAC tables using some native Excel function and SAC formulas.

If you think this post has helped you, please like and share your thoughts in the comments section below. Incase of any queries please ask the same in the comments section and I would be happy to answer the same.

Thanks for reading. I hope you enjoyed the blog.

Check the SAP Analytics Cloud topic page for more up to date information https://community.sap.com/topics/cloud-analytics

follow and read other informative blog posts on SAC browse the below link

https://blogs.sap.com/tags/67838200100800006884/

 

Regards

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SA...
Re: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SA...
entry.content: RAP BO Events are not released. Instead, use the events in if_fins_je_event_handler.

entry.title: Re: What is the FM to update production version
entry.content:
Hello,

this is my first time actually giving a response to something that I think would be valuable.

Atleast in S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 there is a CDS view with implemented behaviour for create/update/delete on production versions.

As far as i can see this should also work for mdv01 eg. field productionline.

Check out CDS view C_PRODUCTIONVERSION.

So to update you need to first get all lines you want to update -> maybe from c_productionversion already and then fill your update table or use a for loop in the modify entities, after that don't forget to commit. I think this should work.

At least for updating variant + variantusage it worked for me.

Since you want modify the field, i would go with something like this:

    DATA: updateproductionversion TYPE TABLE FOR UPDATE c_productionversion.
    updateproductionversion = VALUE #(
      ( material = '0000000...' " material long again
        plant = '0001'
        productionversion = '0001'
        productionline = '' "new productionline
        %control = VALUE #( productionline = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) )
    ).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF c_productionversion
      ENTITY header
        UPDATE
          FIELDS ( productionline )
          WITH updateproductionversion
          MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped)
          FAILED DATA(lt_failed)
          REPORTED DATA(lt_reported).

    COMMIT ENTITIES.

entry.title: Re: SFTP Error on Report Schedule -Invalid credentials we...
entry.content:
I don't have a solution for you but some suggestions for debugging:

SFTP requires a fingerprint, and that could be the problem.  Make sure it's the same in both schedules.

The Default Settings for the two reports could be different, and if you're leaving any fields blank when scheduling, those default settings could be applying.

Job Servers can have default settings, too.  If the reports are going to different job servers, that could be the cause.

If you create brand-new schedules on the two reports, do you get the same behavior?

Setting the job server logging level to "high", and then reviewing the logs after a failure, may produce more valuable info.

entry.title: Migration of inventory from Ecc
entry.content: Moving of IM inventory control to S4 EWM and Batch control. this is been planned for Manufacture sites. are there any documented key watch outs pre work or other tasks that should be completed ahead of a cutover.

entry.title: BRF+ updates to AMT_DOCCUR aren't reflected in IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT, leading to posting, but unchanged.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Issue with BRF+ Integration in BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST – AMT_DOCCUR Not Updated. 

While integrating BRF+ with the BAPI - BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST, we attempted to modify the local currency amount (AMT_DOCCUR) dynamically using BRF+ rules. The logic was executed successfully, and the modified amount was correctly calculated within the BRF+ expression.

However, the issue arises during data mapping—specifically, when assigning the updated amount to the internal table IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT, which is a mandatory input structure for the BAPI.

Despite the updated value being present in the BRF+ output (e.g., a formula or ruleset), it is not getting transferred or passed into the IT_CURRENCYAMOUNT table during runtime. As a result, the BAPI call proceeds with the original amount (or an empty one), and the posting completes without reflecting the intended amount change.

Please let me know if you need anything else. Thank you so much for your quick response in advance.

Thanks again,

Rachna

entry.title: Can we retrieve the Level 1 processor details for a Purchase Order Workflow in S4 HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are using the CDS View: I_WorkflowStatusOverview to retrieve the Purchase Order Workflow details but are not able to find the level 1 approver. We do get all the approver list but we need to display only Level 1 processor details. 

Let us know the CDS view/Field name for the same. 

Refer to the below screenshot: 

Thanks and Regards,

Shweta Sharma

entry.title: Re: Get Certified: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
entry.content: Does SAP provide an Vouchers?

entry.title: HTML5 Apps launched form SAP build workzone site are not opening
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to launch my HTML5 application from build workzone. The application renders successfully when I open it from 'HTML5 Applications' in BTP cockpit subaccount.

However, after adding them to a business site in build workzone, the UI keeps loading and I see 500 errors in Component.js and Component-preload.js. I do not see this issue mentioned in the troubleshooting section of official doc.

Attaching a few screenshots for reference.

App stuck at this page while launching from build workzone site

Network calls and console:

 

 

 

Any suggestions on how to proceed will be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to create custom cubes, queries and measurements using SAP key user tools
entry.content:
Hi @robyn_hu ,

Thanks for this details blog. My requirement is to consume the CDS view in SAP Analytics Cloud. So for this, If I create custom CDS view of type Cube and then Analytical query is that enough ?

Can SAC consume the Analytical query or do I have to perform any other steps ?

Thanks,

Vasavi

entry.title: Supplier Payment by partner company in SAP Business Bydesign
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can anyone assist me in recording the supplier invoice payment issued to Company A but the payment was cleared on behalf by Company B in SAP Business Bydesign system.

Thanks in advance.

 

SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: 0APO_PPDS_ORDER_01 extraction not from livecache
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using the 0APO_PPDS_ORDER_01  to extract orders and data from livecache into a BW reporting cube. Is there a similar extractor that would extract data from a copied planning version? We have data in a copy of the active planning version but i'm not sure how to extract it to BW since you can't copy a planning version from a copy to an active copy (live cache) and subsequently extract it using the 0APO_PPDS_ORDER_01 extractor.

entry.title: Re: Restrict option to cascade goals to certain group of employees
entry.content: Hi @SpireaMihai,

entry.title: improvement Request: Benefits Coverage with Currency
entry.content:
Hello Community,

 

I would like to share with you a new improvement that SAP recommend that we register on Influence Tool:

 

Issue Context:

The Global Benefits is a great tool to manage benefits of our company, but specially to show our employees their benefits, the calculations forms and demonstrate the benefits policy through portlets and relevant informations, but sometimes the values showing on this portlet are so confuse to our end users.

During our implementation of Global Benefits, we note that the insurance coverage values are displayed on Benefits overview portlet without an identification of currency. It is important to user (especially expatriated employees) to know what is this values, if amount, unit or currency, and if currency, what currency the coverage values refers to. It is important too in case of employees that works on more than one employments, managers see the coverage values in different currencies by an option to convert values based on a fix tax determinated by company, like they can do on Compensation and Variable Pay forms.

An example that we would like to see this values is like you see below, where the values have the "USD" identifier after value:

This behavior its not only for insurance coverages but for all coverages on benefits.

 

Improvement

Our suggestion is to convert the amount field of coverage related objects to a type of field that permits to show the currency symbol or an identifier code to knowledge the current currency refers to.

 

Advantages

All companies that has today the Global Benefits implemented can benefit by this enhancement, because this make more transparent information for their end users and administrators.

 

How you can help

Please take a moment to support this enhancement request on the SAP Customer Influence Portal:

Vote Here

Your vote and comments can make a difference in helping SAP prioritize this enhancement that can benefit the entire SuccessFactors ecosystem.

Let’s collaborate and help shape the future of SAP SuccessFactors Global Benefits Tool.

 

Best Regards,

JC

entry.title: Re: Rescheduling of periodic job failed - Company Payment...
entry.content: Start with System log -- Error rescheduling a periodic job, FAQ - SM65  or 3159267 - RDDIMPDP - Failed to reschedule a periodic job.

entry.title: Re: Restrict option to cascade goals to certain group of employees
entry.content: Hi @SpireaMihai, yes, indeed, RBPs are not respected here. I found this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3042997/E in which they say: "(...) due to performance considerations, the goal plan access permission in RBP do not influence the ability to cascade goals in the Latest Goal management. For example, if a Manager does not have access to one of his direct report's goal plan, this manager can still cascade the goal to this direct report."

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Quick Apply in Recruiting. Advantages and Disadvantages
entry.content:
Hello,
We have activated Quick Apply. The Permissions are also stored. However, the CV and cover letter fields are not displayed at the top of Quick Apply. The two fields are missing, although they are set to public.

entry.title: Connect SAP CAP app to another CAP app in a different space through a destination
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently trying to two CAP apps, which are hosted in different spaces, to each other.

I'll call the calling CAP app as AppA on SpaceA and the CAP app that provides the odata API which I'm trying to connect to as AppB on SpaceB.

To give a bit of background, AppB, internally connects to another API where having a user context is important. To achieve this I've decided to create a destination on AppA destination service, which has an authentication type of OAuth2JWTBearer, so the user context can be passed. To automatize the process of destination creation, I'm using mtaext to create the destinations automatically.

As part of the destination, I want to use credentials from AppA's XSUAA and not from AppB, since they are in different spaces and I cannot directly access AppB's XSUAA credentials ( unless I provide them manually). To achieve this, I tried to grant a scope of AppB to AppA so the AppA can query the odata API with their own credentials.

The configuration is the following:

AppB xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "AppBxsname",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [
    {
      "name": "$XSAPPNAME.ScopeToShare",
      "description": "Scope for AppA",
      "grant-as-authority-to-apps": [
        "$XSAPPNAME(application,AppAxsname)"
      ],
      "granted-apps": [
        "$XSAPPNAME(application,AppAxsname)"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [],
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "redirect-uris": [
      "http://*.localhost:5000/**",
      "https://*.hana.ondemand.com/**",
      "https://*.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/**"
    ]
  
}

AppA xs-security.json

{
    "xsappname": "AppAxsname",
    "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
    "scopes": [],
    "attributes": [],
    "role-templates": [],
    "authorities": [
        "$ACCEPT_GRANTED_AUTHORITIES"
    ],
    "foreign-scope-references": [
        "$ACCEPT_GRANTED_SCOPES"
    ]
}

AppA package.json

{
  ...
  "cds": {
    "features": {
      "kibana_formatter": true
    },
    "requires": {,
      "hana": {
        "deploy-format": "hdbtable"
      },
      "[production]": {
        "db": {
          "kind": "hana",
        },
        "auth": {
          "kind": "xsuaa"
        }
      },
      "AppBServ": {
        "kind": "odata",
        "model": "srv/external/AppBServ",
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "appb-destination",
          "path": "/v1/my-service"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

 

When executing the request to AppB I get the following error : The audiences of the token fit none of the supplied services. After debugging the token that is sent, I can see that the audiences does not contain the scope that should've been provided by AppB's xsuaa.

I assume, based on the documentation, that the property granted-apps is supposed to provide the scope to the apps I refer there. But the same seems to not be working properly and I cannot find why.

Any idea what may be missing?

 

Note: Before switching to a destination that has user context, I used a destination with OAuth2ClientCredentials and the same "worked", i.e, I was able to bypass the token validation since the Client token contained the scope provided by AppB as configured in grant-as-authority-to-apps.

entry.title: Migration concept change
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I would like to ask SAP's opinion on the fact that the client changes the migration strategy in the last minute. They went live on 02/06/2025. The original plan was to migrate open items and balances for 31/05/2025, but they changed this in the last minute back to 31/12/2024. They would put all the transactional data from January to May 2025 when they have time (manual or standard sap upload applications). My question: what is the official viewpoint from SAP's side on this? We foresee risks on executing the migration in June 2025 for December 2024.
Thanks, Orsolya

entry.title: Re: Settlement from WBS to cost center of the expenses only
entry.content:
Hi Noy,

1. Certain settings “stick” to WBS at its creation time, so consequent settlement profile updates are not reflected. Goto settlement parameters from the WBS itself and assign a Source Structure there again.

2. Optional settlement is a second radio button - May be settled.

Regards,

P

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign - OData API Examples
entry.content:
Hello Harshal,

that's strange. For me, specifying $filter does not limit the result. But I noticed that if I specify a $filter referring ArrivalPeriod, the ArrivalPeriod element in the result appears as deferred despite I listed it in $expand. And I see you get a JSON result without specifying $format=json. How did you do that?

I obtained the Service XML from Github, would you mind sharing yours so I can check for any differences?

entry.title: Re: HTML5 Apps launched form SAP build workzone site are...

entry.title: 'Item type determination for OB delivery process' with stock room management?
entry.content:
Hello,

Can 'Item type determination for OB delivery process' be used with SRM or is EWM mandatory for this ? 

 

Thanks in advance

Julien

entry.title: Re: Rework required for Fiori apps exposed in SAP Workzon...
entry.content: Hi Fabio, Thanks for your response. The app concerned is an existing 3rd party app from OpenText. The archive server in this case is setup as a external Content Repository (CR) on the SAP Backend with transaction OAC0. The URL inside that CR definition is retrieved somewhere in the logic and used as part of the URL to the actual image.Then the image URL is called by the browser of the Workzone user. I can expose the content server via the SAP Cloud connector, but cannot change the logic that constructs the image URL and calls it.

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content: @marbeth_chavezw @Xenia  The image issue has been resolved, and all validations are now functioning as expected. Please let us know if you continue to experience any issues.

entry.title: Re: Rescheduling of periodic job failed - Company Payment...
entry.content: Hello @VijaykumarV, what should I check? I'm able to acess TBTCO and TBTCS by SE16N. But the Jobs that I mentioned are not there.

entry.title: can we add new action button to standard FIORI application in public cloud by using IN_APP Extensib?
entry.content: can we add new action button to standard FIORI application in public cloud by using IN_APP Extensibility or any other way please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Get the error "cannot commit package xxx and earlier...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Please apply the note 3413163 - SAP Datasphere - ABAP Integration - Error "Cannot commit package...and earlier packages in sequence"

We recommend that you run the note analyzer and apply the missing corrections, the note analyzer is covered in note 3016862 - Separated Note Analyzers for ABAP-based Migration and Replication Technology (DMIS2011/DMIS2018/DMIS2020/SAP S/4HANA). Because this is a Datasphere scenario you would run program CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI or transaction CNV_NA_DI.

 

Best Regards,
Michael

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Stock Room Management
entry.content:
Hello, do you know if 'Item type determination for OB delivery process' can be used with Stock Room Management ? = No need to swich to EWM ?

Thanks in advance

BR
Julien

entry.title: Story Report Todate not working
entry.content:
Has anyone experience using formula TODATE()

i tried using and its not working.

error:

entry.title: Re: Flow accounting documents costs to material valuation...
entry.content:
Hi Heitor,

may I ask what you are trying to achieve specifically?

If you are using actual costing or are working with moving average price materials, the material debit/credit functionality available via Fiori app "Manage Material Valuations" can have an impact on the material inventory value on your balance sheet. The price of moving average price controlled materials will be updated immediately after executing the debit/credit and for S-price controlled materials actual costing can consider these values and allocate them to material inventory/consumption at period end.

Otherwise, any price change, direct or indirect e.g. via material cost estimate release will update material inventory as well.

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Marvin

entry.title: I've shared a story report to a manager but when the manager run the story report its blank
entry.content: I shared the story report with the manager and then proxied as the manager to test. when i ran the report, only the manager's own profile was displayed - none of their direct reports were showing

Thanks for the challenge! @ajay_soreng

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 FilterBar with SmartVariantManagement

entry.title: Re: API Scope for service key to register S/4HANA and ena...
entry.content: I'm afraid the question was not about which additional API scope is needed, but which API scope is needed to restrict the Service Key to minimum permission, using the "least privileged" approach ... The default API Service Key has, what looks like, full permission ( "scope": "uaa.resource",), so the plan was to create one with just fill API scopes.

entry.title: Re: Session on Input Service Distribution (ISD) functionality in SAP
entry.content: Recordings are available in India Enterprise Resource Planning Localization Work Zone

entry.title: Manage My Team Tile Error: "An application error occurred"
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

one manager gets the following error message when he tries to access Manage My Team Tile:

"An application error occurred. Please try again later, or notify support if the issue keeps occurring."



The manager has his own team but he can't manage them through the Manage My Tam Tile

Do you have any ideas what can cause this error message?

Best regards
Lukasz

entry.title: Re: Migration of inventory from Ecc
entry.content:
Hello @flynnjg 

EWM stock is uploaded with /SCWM/ISU transaction based on CSV files. Refer to the note 974852 - Stock data transfer using transaction /SCWM/ISU for the file templates. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Passed C_SIGBT_2409 – Seeking Advice on Next SAP Cert...
entry.content:
Congrats on passing the C_SIGBT_2409 exam — that’s a big milestone!

If you're looking to go deeper into business transformation and already have a solid grip on Signavio and process governance, I’d recommend the SAP Certified Associate – Process Management Consultant – SAP Signavio (C_SIGPM_2403) next. It builds directly on what you’ve covered and really sharpens your skills around process modeling, collaboration, and governance. I found it especially helpful for understanding how to structure process ownership and run transformation initiatives end-to-end.

Good luck on the next step!

entry.title: Re: Handle Asynchronous task in background job from a stateless UI application using RAP business ob
entry.content:
Hello anusuya,

I did that in my RAP application with an action button, but when it is calling the function module with the destination 'none', trigger a dump with this detail.

The system tried to call function "Z_XXXXXXX" by RFC to destination "NONE".
Reason: "NOT_A_DYNAMIC_DESTINATION" 

And my function module is RFC enable.

entry.title: Oracle space management script CRITICAL issue
entry.content: Im getting incident related retention target percentage not reached.how to fix this

entry.title: SAP MDK offline iOS: Attachment UploadStream failed during sync
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently developing an application where you can upload attachments from both mobile and web and it also works in offline mode.
The MDK version is 24.4.0

I use odata V4 and the field that contains the content of the attachments is of type "Edm.Stream".

To upload attachments, first I create the attachment record without the "Edm.Stream" field, then to upload the attachment content I use "Action.Type.UploadStream" and for viewing I use "Action.Type.OpenDocument"

On Web it is working properly and saves the attachment content in the db.

From mobile (in offline mode), especially from iOS devices, the attachment is loaded and can be viewed. But, at the time of synchronization the attachment record is loaded into the db and then the method that inserts the attachment content fails. The error is the following:

Sync offline data service failure - Error:[-10340] The upload failed due to an error on the server: -857 (SERVER_SYNCHRONIZATION_ERROR) ([-10225] Message: User exception: Cannot invoke "String.toLowerCase()" because "contentType" is null)

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to get row values as column heading in webi report
entry.content: Turn On the "Show Objects Name" property for the Crosstab Table.  We are running BOB4.3, SP4, P700.  Not sure in what version this was added or if it has always been there.  Unfortunately, there seems to be an issue with this functionality in the version we are running, but it is the setting that should do what you are asking for automatically.

entry.title: maintain tables in the type structure
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

it is possible to maintain tables in the type structure? If so, how? If not, why?

We need this info for migration of master data objects like info records...

Thanks for reply.

Best regards.

Peter

entry.title: Re: Replace a value in a column based a value in another...
entry.content: Great , this solve my problem , thanks William

@GustavoFonseca 

You can try T Code - SCU3

Table - TBTCO and other TBTC* tables you can check. Check box log

Vijaykumar

entry.title: sap public cloud BADI needed for VF02 release to accounting
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I looking for BAdi's for VF01 or VF02 during Acc document creation or release to accounting in SAP public cloud platform .

I tried the following BAdi but these are not triggering

FCI_BADI_INVOICING~FKK_EVENT_2612

ES_SD_BIL_EXTEND~SD_BIL_APM_SET_APP_REASON

FCI_BADI_BILLINGREQUEST~FKK_EVENT_8300

FKK_BADI_SD~FKK_EVENT_4040

the goal is to add the billing document details into a custom table when they proceed to create accounting document number.

please share your input as i am struck with this for almost 3 days.

entry.title: Re: No certification even after a week of exam and support ticket
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi if you notice I already have a Support ticket. 😞😞

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Reference Architecture? [Spring Edition]
entry.content:
Excellent progress! 

What future plans are in place to provide APIs that enable EAM tools other than LeanIX (e.g., Essential Project) to integrate the SAP Reference Architecture Content?

Thanks,

Simon

entry.title: Re: How to use Postman to call SuccessFactors API using OAuth authentication method and SAP Offline
entry.content:
Hi @dhairya I had the same error as you, I ended up writing the command instead of pasting it.

This is the pasted command:

mvn compile exec:java -Dexec.args=”SAMLAssertion.properties”

Here is the one I wrote for myself:

mvn compile exec:java -Dexec.args="SAMLAssertion.properties"

As you can see, the difference is in the quotation marks, the latter is the correct use of the quotation marks. Thank you @Wes_Ancog for the brilliant blog, it helped a lot

entry.title: Re: can we add new action button to standard FIORI applic...
entry.content: Look in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (S/4HANA public cloud) for the application, in the 'IMPLEMENTATION INFORMATION' tab, look for the node 'Extensibility'

entry.title: Re: Migration concept change
entry.content:
Hi @OrsolyaToth 

If data is uploaded till 31 Dec 2024 and Go live was done on 2nd June 2025  and business is saying they would upload Jan to May transaction manually when they have time ? How would this be possible ?

Without data from Jan to May, how would business run the end to end transaction where cross module is involved like PP - MM - SD - FI CO ? Business would need SO, PO, PP details in the system to proceed and complete the cycle, not all transactions can be posted independently. Only some part like Direct FI postings can be managed independently but end to end flow with cross module involvement not possible. 

So Jan to May data is very much required to run the business. 

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Dynamic Text in Measure - Analytics Cloud - Live Data Model
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a dashboard with a Live Data Model from a SAP BW Query. In the story, I have a restricted Key Figure with an Input Date Control on Story level. In this way, I have components that show measures, filtered by CM-current month, YTM-year to month, LYTM-last year to month, YOY-year over year and so on.

Is there a way to show the actual range in the name of the measure as Dynamic Text?

It can get a bit confusing as to what is being shown in a component.

An example of an input control restricting the measure:

For greater clarity in the chart, I would like the actual time range in the name of the measure.

Or if at least I can use scripting to change the text in the Subtitle?

Also, is there a way to limit it to DECEMBER of PREVIOUS YEAR of the selected input control?

entry.title: Re: Project cost vs payroll posting in professional servi...
entry.content:
Hello @LeventePosza,

the recommendation for professional service customers is to use the cost rates for services (usually maintained per year) and time recordings to determine the credit of the cost center and the debit of the workpackage. Over- or underconsumption based on difference between credit towards projects and debit via payroll and other cost postings on the cost center remain there.

Regarding your questions:

1. Payroll postings shouldn't be linked to the WBS as the cost on the WBS are already posted based on hours and cost rates for service

2. It is not standard practice to repost payroll costs to WBS

3. Under/Over-realization remains on the cost center

4. Best practice for revenue in time and expense contracts is to maintain a project specific sales price (condition PCP0); for fix price the standard revenue recognition key SPFC is based on a cost based POC taken into consideration plan cost and actual cost based on time recordings and maintained cost rates per hour.

Best regards,

David

entry.title: Re: Treating Business Goals as "Individual" Goals possible?
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec

sorry for the late response, we needed to configure compensation first. 

Back to the VP part I understood that this is not possible or at least totally not recommended.

Some background information regarding this: this information can be part of individual goals as well but it is not measured on any PM or GM form. The issue is this KPI is measured outside of SF.

Now maybe you can come back to me with an answer or help to achieve this: is it possible to get this information on any form? As an example that came to my mind was to create a PMGM form especially for this requirement, upload the KPIs (how many hours are required and how many hours are achieved) and link this information to VP as well, in total having 2 sources. 

Second thing that came to my mind: the information are only 2 values per employee that could be entered / uploaded in EC. Is it possible to get this information into VP as goals in any way? I am here again thinking of having maybe a PMGM form and use integration center to pull these two values from EC and put them on a form. 

Not sure if this is a good idea or solution for my problem but maybe you can challenge these ideas or maybe have something in mind that could work as well? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Text is not visible in lower level of level based hierarchy with compounded key
entry.content:
Hi Martin, thanks for the answer

Please see screenshot

I've got an answer from SAP that Level-based hierarchies are not supported for dimensions with more than one key column according to SAP note number

So, I tried to build a parent-child hierarchy to get the same results, but couldn't make it work

If your dimension has more than one key column, then you should add an additional line for each key column (see step2, Parent Column/ Child Column).

I tried to do it like this but something is not correct in the definition

Can you help?

Shlomi

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP : SAP Business Application Studio - Dev Space stuck in "STOPPING" status

entry.title: DEVSPACE in BAS remain in stopping status

We have our devspace BAS in stopping status for me than 6 hours.

our URL is : https://bas-xgxvl13j.ca10cf.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html#ws-vfmsj

Regards

entry.title: Re: Possibility to register different branches within one...
entry.content: Thank you for your input. We have created an improvement request for this topic with specific direction to suppliers: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/349117?section=sectionComments

entry.title: Re: invoice number range
entry.content:
Hi 

The only feasible option in this scenario is to define separate document types according to plant(s)  and assign distinct number ranges accordingly.

  • For example:
    Plant 0001 → Document Type ZIV1
    Plant 0002 → Document Type ZIV2  …and so on.

You can then assign different number ranges to each document type as per plant-specific requirements.
Additionally, it's recommended to maintain user authorizations based on document types and/or plants to ensure appropriate control and access.

Thanks 
Santosh

entry.title: Re: How to default a cost center for vendor line item thr...
entry.content:
Hi @Sahithjadala 

Cost Center is assigned in Expense line item and not to Vendor line item. Vendor line item is posted with Reconciliation account which is balance sheet account. Process wise, this requirement is wrong as cost center is should be assigned to expense line item.

Anyway you can use Substitution OBBH with some user exit logic as in standard it would not be possible.

Please check and confirm

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@jeetendrakapase 

hello, regardind the question about Data Products from @SreekanthSurampally ,

the link you post is for the marketplace.

This means that custom data products will be prepared in Datasphere and will use replicaiton flow + physicization on a Datasphere Space, either of type file (HDLF) or normal hana cloud, instead of the foundation layer managed by SAP.

Is this right?

entry.title: Re: Doesn't seem like for Learning I can use Item Connect...
entry.content:
Sf Learning explicitly sets OCN imported items as External as to indicate they will receive OCN API updates/completions and should not be updated from this by an item connector, see KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2481855 
You can go to the Libraries and then add OCN items via search for items with the filter for this external-course classification to add accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Publish Product in SAP API Management
entry.content: did you provision your APIM under settings?

entry.title: Re: How to provide visibility to all requisitions globally
entry.content:
I don’t have a KBA readily available, but I may be able to help your search for a KBA. We use recruiting groups to give our recruiters visibility into all requisitions. This setup was introduced to support coverage during leaves of absence, vacations, etc.. The group is automatically assigned whenever a requisition is created within the recruiter team support section. 

Below is our support team from our requisition. The admin selected group, SWRecruiters, is global access.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello SAP Community!

entry.title: Re: Setting Up the Latest Benefits Enrollment Experience: Step-by-Step Configuration and Helpful Tip
entry.content: How do I make the Effective Date of the enrollment in the Latest Benefit UI editable? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hello Thomas, hello Eberechukwu,

we would like to host a CodeJam regarding one or both of the following topics this year in Bielefeld:

  • Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
  • Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub

Would this be possible?

Thank you very much!

David

entry.title: Integration of SAP FSM with S/4HANA and C4C via CPI for Equipment Creation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to integrate SAP Field Service Management (FSM) with SAP S/4HANA and SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) systems using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) as the middleware.

Requirement:
When an Equipment is created in SAP FSM, the same equipment should automatically be created in both S/4HANA and C4C systems.

Help Required:
How to configure the communication arrangement in SAP FSM to trigger the Equipment creation event to CPI?
Are there any standard APIs in FSM that we need to configure to send Equipment creation data to CPI?
Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav
